arguments.content:
"""
AstroHub E2E 测试 - 设备连接/断开/主控台显示

使用 Playwright 模拟用户操作：
1. 打开主控台页面
2. 选择设备
3. 连接设备
4. 验证图像显示
5. 断开设备
6. 报告问题列表

Author: 开发工厂
"""

import asyncio
from playwright.async_api import async_playwright, Page, Browser
from datetime import datetime
import json

# 测试配置
BASE_URL = "http://localhost:8000"
DEVICE_IP = "192.168.5.72"
DEVICE_MAC = "240f9b764193"
USERNAME = "admin"
PASSWORD = "Nftw1357"
PORT = 80

# 问题列表
issues: list[dict] = []


def log_issue(category: str, description: str, severity: str = "medium", details: str = ""):
    """记录问题"""
    issues.append({
        "category": category,
        "description": description,
        "severity": severity,
        "details": details,
        "timestamp": datetime.now().isoformat(),
    })


async def wait_for_element(page: Page, selector: str, timeout: int = 5000) -> bool:
    """等待元素出现"""
    try:
        await page.wait_for_selector(selector, timeout=timeout)
        return True
    except Exception:
        return False


async def test_main_page_load(page: Page):
    """测试1: 主页面加载"""
    print("\n[测试1] 主页面加载...")
    
    try:
        await page.goto(BASE_URL, timeout=10000)
        await page.wait_for_load_state("networkidle", timeout=10000)
        
        # 检查标题
        title = await page.title()
        if not title or "AstroHub" not in title:
            log_issue("页面加载", "页面标题不包含 AstroHub", "low", f"实际标题: {title}")
        
        # 检查导航栏
        nav_exists = await wait_for_element(page, ".nav", 3000)
        if not nav_exists:
            log_issue("页面加载", "导航栏不存在", "high", "无法找到 .nav 元素")
        
        # 检查 WebSocket 状态指示器
        ws_dot = await page.query_selector("#wsDot")
        if ws_dot:
            ws_class = await ws_dot.get_attribute("class")
            print(f"  WebSocket 状态: {ws_class}")
        else:
            log_issue("页面加载", "WebSocket 状态指示器不存在", "medium", "#wsDot 元素缺失")
        
        print("  ✓ 主页面加载完成")
        
    except Exception as e:
        log_issue("页面加载", "主页面加载失败", "critical", str(e))


async def test_console_page(page: Page):
    """测试2: 主控台页面"""
    print("\n[测试2] 主控台页面...")
    
    try:
        # 点击 Console 导航按钮
        console_btn = await page.query_selector("button.nav-btn[data-page='console']")
        if not console_btn:
            # 尝试其他选择器
            console_btn = await page.query_selector("text=Console")
        
        if console_btn:
            await console_btn.click()
            await page.wait_for_timeout(1000)
            
            # 检查主控台布局
            console_layout = await page.query_selector(".console-layout")
            if not console_layout:
                log_issue("主控台", "主控台布局不存在", "high", ".console-layout 元素缺失")
            
            # 检查 PTZ 控制面板
            ptz_controls = await page.query_selector(".ptz-controls")
            if not ptz_controls:
                log_issue("主控台", "PTZ 控制面板不存在", "high", ".ptz-controls 元素缺失")
            
            # 检查视频显示区域
            video_container = await page.query_selector("#videoContainer")
            if not video_container:
                log_issue("主控台", "视频显示容器不存在", "high", "#videoContainer 元素缺失")
            
            print("  ✓ 主控台页面元素检查完成")
        else:
            log_issue("主控台", "Console 导航按钮不存在", "high", "无法找到 Console 按钮")
            
    except Exception as e:
        log_issue("主控台", "主控台页面访问失败", "critical", str(e))


async def test_device_selection(page: Page):
    """测试3: 设备选择"""
    print("\n[测试3] 设备选择...")
    
    try:
        # 查找设备选择下拉框
        device_select = await page.query_selector("#connectDevice")
        if not device_select:
            device_select = await page.query_selector("select#advConnectDevice")
        
        if device_select:
            # 获取选项列表
            options = await device_select.query_selector_all("option")
            print(f"  设备选项数量: {len(options)}")
            
            if len(options) == 0:
                log_issue("设备选择", "设备下拉框无选项", "high", "没有可用设备")
            else:
                # 选择第一个设备
                await device_select.select_option(index=0)
                selected_value = await device_select.input_value()
                print(f"  选中设备: {selected_value}")
                
                if not selected_value:
                    log_issue("设备选择", "设备选择失败", "medium", "选择后无值")
            
            print("  ✓ 设备选择检查完成")
        else:
            log_issue("设备选择", "设备选择下拉框不存在", "high", "#connectDevice 或 #advConnectDevice 缺失")
            
    except Exception as e:
        log_issue("设备选择", "设备选择失败", "critical", str(e))


async def test_device_connect(page: Page):
    """测试4: 设备连接"""
    print("\n[测试4] 设备连接...")
    
    try:
        # 查找连接按钮
        connect_btn = await page.query_selector("#btnConnect")
        if not connect_btn:
            connect_btn = await page.query_selector("button:text('连接')")
        
        if connect_btn:
            # 检查按钮状态
            btn_disabled = await connect_btn.is_disabled()
            if btn_disabled:
                log_issue("设备连接", "连接按钮被禁用", "medium", "按钮 disabled=True")
            
            # 点击连接
            await connect_btn.click()
            await page.wait_for_timeout(3000)  # 等待连接
            
            # 检查连接状态
            ws_dot = await page.query_selector("#wsDot")
            if ws_dot:
                ws_class = await ws_dot.get_attribute("class")
                if "green" in ws_class:
                    print("  ✓ WebSocket 已连接")
                elif "red" in ws_class:
                    log_issue("设备连接", "WebSocket 连接失败", "high", f"状态: {ws_class}")
                else:
                    log_issue("设备连接", "WebSocket 状态异常", "medium", f"状态: {ws_class}")
            
            # 检查 Toast 消息
            toast = await page.query_selector(".toast")
            if toast:
                toast_text = await toast.inner_text()
                print(f"  Toast 消息: {toast_text}")
                if "失败" in toast_text or "error" in toast_text.lower():
                    log_issue("设备连接", "连接失败 Toast", "high", toast_text)
            
            print("  ✓ 设备连接检查完成")
        else:
            log_issue("设备连接", "连接按钮不存在", "high", "#btnConnect 缺失")
            
    except Exception as e:
        log_issue("设备连接", "设备连接操作失败", "critical", str(e))


async def test_video_display(page: Page):
    """测试5: 视频显示"""
    print("\n[测试5] 视频显示...")
    
    try:
        # 检查视频容器
        video_container = await page.query_selector("#videoContainer")
        if video_container:
            # 检查是否有视频播放器
            video_player = await video_container.query_selector("video")
            wasm_player = await video_container.query_selector("#wasmPlayer")
            canvas = await video_container.query_selector("canvas")
            
            if video_player:
                print("  ✓ HTML5 video 元素存在")
                video_src = await video_player.get_attribute("src")
                if video_src:
                    print(f"    视频源: {video_src[:50]}...")
                else:
                    log_issue("视频显示", "video 元素无 src", "medium", "视频源未设置")
            elif wasm_player:
                print("  ✓ WASM 播放器存在")
            elif canvas:
                print("  ✓ Canvas 播放器存在")
            else:
                log_issue("视频显示", "无视频播放器元素", "high", "video/wasmPlayer/canvas 都不存在")
            
            # 检查容器是否有内容（非空白）
            container_html = await video_container.inner_html()
            if not container_html or container_html.strip() == "":
                log_issue("视频显示", "视频容器为空", "high", "#videoContainer 内无内容")
            
            # 检查占位提示
            placeholder = await video_container.query_selector(".obs-placeholder")
            if placeholder:
                placeholder_text = await placeholder.inner_text()
                log_issue("视频显示", "显示占位提示而非视频", "medium", placeholder_text)
            
            print("  ✓ 视频显示检查完成")
        else:
            log_issue("视频显示", "视频容器不存在", "high", "#videoContainer 缺失")
            
    except Exception as e:
        log_issue("视频显示", "视频显示检查失败", "critical", str(e))


async def test_device_disconnect(page: Page):
    """测试6: 设备断开"""
    print("\n[测试6] 设备断开...")
    
    try:
        # 查找断开按钮
        disconnect_btn = await page.query_selector("#btnDisconnect")
        if not disconnect_btn:
            disconnect_btn = await page.query_selector("button:text('断开')")
        
        if disconnect_btn:
            btn_disabled = await disconnect_btn.is_disabled()
            if btn_disabled:
                log_issue("设备断开", "断开按钮被禁用", "medium", "按钮 disabled=True")
            
            await disconnect_btn.click()
            await page.wait_for_timeout(2000)
            
            # 检查 WebSocket 状态
            ws_dot = await page.query_selector("#wsDot")
            if ws_dot:
                ws_class = await ws_dot.get_attribute("class")
                if "red" in ws_class:
                    print("  ✓ WebSocket 已断开")
                else:
                    log_issue("设备断开", "断开后 WebSocket 状态未变红", "medium", f"状态: {ws_class}")
            
            print("  ✓ 设备断开检查完成")
        else:
            log_issue("设备断开", "断开按钮不存在", "medium", "#btnDisconnect 缺失")
            
    except Exception as e:
        log_issue("设备断开", "设备断开操作失败", "critical", str(e))


async def test_api_health(page: Page):
    """测试7: API 健康检查"""
    print("\n[测试7] API 健康检查...")
    
    try:
        # 直接调用 API
        health_resp = await page.evaluate("""
            async () => {
                try {
                    const resp = await fetch('/api/v1/health');
                    return { status: resp.status, body: await resp.text() };
                } catch (e) {
                    return { error: e.message };
                }
            }
        """)
        
        if health_resp.get("error"):
            log_issue("API健康", "健康检查 API 调用失败", "high", health_resp["error"])
        elif health_resp.get("status") == 200:
            print(f"  ✓ 健康检查 API 正常: {health_resp['body'][:100]}")
        else:
            log_issue("API健康", "健康检查返回非200", "medium", f"状态码: {health_resp['status']}")
        
        # 检查设备列表 API
        devices_resp = await page.evaluate("""
            async () => {
                try {
                    const resp = await fetch('/api/v1/ptz/devices');
                    return { status: resp.status, body: await resp.json() };
                } catch (e) {
                    return { error: e.message };
                }
            }
        """)
        
        if devices_resp.get("error"):
            log_issue("API设备", "设备列表 API 调用失败", "high", devices_resp["error"])
        elif devices_resp.get("status") == 200:
            devices = devices_resp.get("body", [])
            print(f"  ✓ 设备列表 API 正常: {len(devices)} 个设备")
            if len(devices) == 0:
                log_issue("API设备", "设备列表为空", "medium", "无注册设备")
        else:
            log_issue("API设备", "设备列表返回非200", "medium", f"状态码: {devices_resp['status']}")
        
        print("  ✓ API 健康检查完成")
        
    except Exception as e:
        log_issue("API健康", "API 健康检查失败", "critical", str(e))


async def run_tests():
    """运行所有测试"""
    print("=" * 60)
    print("AstroHub E2E 测试报告")
    print("=" * 60)
    print(f"测试时间: {datetime.now().isoformat()}")
    print(f"测试目标: {BASE_URL}")
    print("=" * 60)
    
    async with async_playwright() as p:
        browser = await p.chromium.launch(headless=True)
        context = await browser.new_context(
            viewport={"width": 1920, "height": 1080},
            locale="zh-CN",
        )
        page = await context.new_page()
        
        # 截图保存路径
        screenshot_dir = "C:/Users/admin/.openclaw/agents/dev-factory/astrohub/data/e2e_screenshots"
        
        try:
            await test_main_page_load(page)
            await page.screenshot(path=f"{screenshot_dir}/01_main_page.png")
            
            await test_console_page(page)
            await page.screenshot(path=f"{screenshot_dir}/02_console_page.png")
            
            await test_device_selection(page)
            await page.screenshot(path=f"{screenshot_dir}/03_device_selection.png")
            
            await test_device_connect(page)
            await page.screenshot(path=f"{screenshot_dir}/04_device_connect.png")
            await page.wait_for_timeout(2000)
            
            await test_video_display(page)
            await page.screenshot(path=f"{screenshot_dir}/05_video_display.png")
            
            await test_device_disconnect(page)
            await page.screenshot(path=f"{screenshot_dir}/06_device_disconnect.png")
            
            await test_api_health(page)
            
        except Exception as e:
            log_issue("测试框架", "测试执行异常", "critical", str(e))
        
        finally:
            await browser.close()
    
    # 输出问题报告
    print("\n" + "=" * 60)
    print("问题报告")
    print("=" * 60)
    
    if issues:
        # 按严重程度排序
        severity_order = {"critical": 0, "high": 1, "medium": 2, "low": 3}
        sorted_issues = sorted(issues, key=lambda x: severity_order.get(x["severity"], 4))
        
        print(f"\n发现 {len(issues)} 个问题:\n")
        
        for i, issue in enumerate(sorted_issues, 1):
            severity_icon = {
                "critical": "🔴",
                "high": "🟠",
                "medium": "🟡",
                "low": "🟢",
            }.get(issue["severity"], "⚪")
            
            print(f"{i}. {severity_icon} [{issue['severity'].upper()}] {issue['category']}")
            print(f"   描述: {issue['description']}")
            if issue['details']:
                print(f"   详情: {issue['details']}")
            print()
        
        # 统计
        critical_count = sum(1 for i in issues if i["severity"] == "critical")
        high_count = sum(1 for i in issues if i["severity"] == "high")
        medium_count = sum(1 for i in issues if i["severity"] == "medium")
        low_count = sum(1 for i in issues if i["severity"] == "low")
        
        print("-" * 40)
        print(f"统计: Critical={critical_count}, High={high_count}, Medium={medium_count}, Low={low_count}")
        
    else:
        print("\n✅ 未发现问题，所有测试通过！")
    
    # 保存报告
    report_path = "C:/Users/admin/.openclaw/agents/dev-factory/astrohub/data/e2e_report.json"
    with open(report_path, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        json.dump({
            "test_time": datetime.now().isoformat(),
            "target": BASE_URL,
            "issues": issues,
            "total_issues": len(issues),
            "summary": {
                "critical": sum(1 for i in issues if i["severity"] == "critical"),
                "high": sum(1 for i in issues if i["severity"] == "high"),
                "medium": sum(1 for i in issues if i["severity"] == "medium"),
                "low": sum(1 for i in issues if i["severity"] == "low"),
            }
        }, f, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)
    
    print(f"\n报告已保存: {report_path}")
    print(f"截图已保存: {screenshot_dir}/")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    asyncio.run(run_tests())

arguments.content:
"""AstroHub UI 结构探测"""
from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright

with sync_playwright() as p:
    browser = p.chromium.launch(headless=True)
    page = browser.new_page(viewport={"width": 1920, "height": 1080})
    page.goto("http://localhost:8000", timeout=10000)
    page.wait_for_load_state("networkidle", timeout=10000)
    
    # Find all buttons
    buttons = page.query_selector_all("button")
    for b in buttons:
        text = b.inner_text()
        btn_id = b.get_attribute("id") or ""
        btn_class = b.get_attribute("class") or ""
        print(f"BUTTON: id={btn_id} class={btn_class} text={text[:50]}")
    
    # Find all select elements  
    selects = page.query_selector_all("select")
    for s in selects:
        s_id = s.get_attribute("id") or ""
        options = s.query_selector_all("option")
        opt_texts = [o.inner_text() for o in options]
        print(f"SELECT: id={s_id} options={opt_texts[:5]}")
    
    # Find video/canvas elements
    for sel in ["video", "canvas", "#videoContainer", "#wasmPlayer", "iframe"]:
        elems = page.query_selector_all(sel)
        for e in elems:
            tag = e.evaluate("el => el.tagName")
            e_id = e.get_attribute("id") or ""
            print(f"MEDIA: tag={tag} id={e_id}")
    
    # Find WebSocket status
    ws = page.query_selector("#wsDot")
    if ws:
        cls = ws.get_attribute("class")
        print(f"WS DOT: class={cls}")
    else:
        print("WS DOT: NOT FOUND")
    
    # Check console page
    console_btn = page.query_selector("button.nav-btn:nth-child(2)")
    if console_btn:
        console_btn.click()
        page.wait_for_timeout(1000)
        print("\n--- Console Page ---")
        
        # Re-check elements after page switch
        for sel in ["#connectDevice", "#btnConnect", "#btnDisconnect", "#videoContainer", ".ptz-controls"]:
            elem = page.query_selector(sel)
            print(f"  {sel}: {'FOUND' if elem else 'NOT FOUND'}")
    
    # Check Advanced page
    adv_btns = page.query_selector_all("button.nav-btn")
    for btn in adv_btns:

现在有清晰的结果了。关键发现：

1. **视频播放器存在** — 使用海康 WASM SDK 的 `divPlugin_playWindow*` 和 `divPlugin_playCanvas*`，不是 `#videoContainer`
2. **设备选择不存在** — 没有 `#connectDevice` 或 `#advConnectDevice`，说明设备连接是通过其他方式（可能是自动连接或通过 API）
3. **PTZ 控制面板存在** — `.ptz-controls` 已找到
4. **WebSocket 未连接** — `status-dot red`

content.text: 现在我理解了完整的设备连接流程。让我看设备管理页面的连接逻辑：

现在我理解了：

**设备连接流程：**
1. 设备管理页面 → 点击"连接"按钮 → `connectDevice(ip)` 函数
2. 调用 `/api/v1/devices/{ip}/connect` API
3. 成功后设置 `window.connectedDevice`
4. 调用 WASM SDK 的 `clickLogin2()` 开始视频播放

**问题分析：**
- 测试脚本找不到 `#connectDevice` 是因为设备选择在**设备管理页面**（Device 页面）
- Console 页面和 Advanced 页面使用 `window.connectedDevice` 全局变量
- 视频播放器使用海康 WASM SDK（`divPlugin_*`），不是 `#videoContainer`

API 问题分析：
- `/api/v1/health` ✅ 正常
- `/api/v1/ptz/devices` ❌ 404 — 路由不存在
- `/api/v1/devices` ✅ 返回空数组

`/api/v1/ptz/devices` 不存在，但 `/api/v1/devices` 存在。这是路由问题。让我检查 API router：

"""
AstroHub v2.0 - 统一路由聚合

整合 M1-M11 所有模块路由到 /api/v1/ 下:
- /api/v1/health            - 全局健康检查
- /api/v1/discovery/sadp    - SADP 设备发现
- /api/v1/devices/*         - 设备管理（真实）
- /api/v1/ptz/*             - PTZ 控制（真实）
- /api/v1/streams/*         - 流服务
- /api/v1/calibration/*     - 校准
- /api/v1/ascom/*           - ASCOM 设备
- /api/v1/settings          - 系统设置

Author: 雅痞张@南方天文
"""

from __future__ import annotations

import time
from datetime import datetime, timezone
from typing import Any

from pydantic import BaseModel
from fastapi import APIRouter, FastAPI, Query
from fastapi.responses import JSONResponse

# ================================================================ #
#  核心模块导入
# ================================================================ #

from src.core.ptz_manager import PTZManager
from src.core.device_manager import DeviceManager
from src.core.stream_manager import StreamManager
from src.core.calibration_manager import CalibrationManager
from src.core.auth import AuthManager
from src.core.ws_manager import WebSocketManager
from src.core.ascom_manager import ASCOMManager
from src.core.orchestrator import Orchestrator
from src.core.health_monitor import HealthMonitor


# ================================================================ #
#  路由前缀定义
# ================================================================ #

API_V1_PREFIX = "/api/v1"

# 主 API 路由器
api_router = APIRouter(prefix=API_V1_PREFIX, tags=["API v1"])

# 健康检查路由器
health_router = APIRouter(prefix="/api/v1", tags=["System"])


# ================================================================ #
#  Pydantic 请求模型
# ================================================================ #

class AddDeviceRequest(BaseModel):
    """手动添加设备请求。"""
    ip: str
    port: int = 80
    username: str = "admin"
    password: str
    name: str = ""
    model: str = ""
    mac: str = ""

class ConnectDeviceRequest(BaseModel):
    """连接设备请求。"""
    username: str = "admin"
    password: str
    port: int = 80

class ModifyNetworkRequest(BaseModel):
    """修改网络配置请求。"""
    ip: str
    subnet_mask: str = "255.255.255.0"
    gateway: str

class SADPIpModifyRequest(BaseModel):
    """SADP IP 修改请求 (含循环验证)。"""
    mac: str
    password: str
    new_ip: str
    original_ip: str = ""
    subnet_mask: str = "255.255.255.0"
    gateway: str = ""

class SystemInfoRequest(BaseModel):
    """系统信息请求（可选的绑定 ip）。"""
    nic_index: int | None = None

class PTZMoveRequest(BaseModel):
    """PTZ 移动请求。"""
    direction: str
    speed: int = 50

class PTZAbsoluteRequest(BaseModel):
    """PTZ 绝对移动请求。"""
    pan: float
    tilt: float
    zoom: float | None = None
    speed: int = 50

class PTZPresetRequest(BaseModel):
    """PTZ 预置位请求。"""
    preset_id: int

class SADPScanRequest(BaseModel):
    """SADP 发现请求。"""
    bind_ip: str = "0.0.0.0"

class RemoveDeviceRequest(BaseModel):
    """移除设备请求。"""
    ip: str = ""
    mac: str = ""


class PTZCaptureRequest(BaseModel):
    """PTZ 截图请求。"""
    stream_url: str = ""
    stream_id: str = ""


class PTZRecordRequest(BaseModel):
    """PTZ 录像请求。"""
    target_name: str = ""


class TelescopeSlewRequest(BaseModel):
    """望远镜 Slew 请求。"""
    ra: float
    dec: float


class TelescopeTrackingRequest(BaseModel):
    """望远镜跟踪模式请求。"""
    mode: str  # trackSidereal / trackLunar / trackSolar / trackOff


# ================================================================ #
#  操作日志 (最多 10 条)
# ================================================================ #

operations_log: list[dict[str, str]] = []
MAX_LOG_ENTRIES = 10


def operation_log(action: str, details: str) -> None:
    """追加操作到日志列表（环形缓冲区，最多 MAX_LOG_ENTRIES 条）。"""
    entry = {
        "timestamp": datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat(),
        "action": action,
        "details": details,
    }
    operations_log.append(entry)
    if len(operations_log) > MAX_LOG_ENTRIES:
        operations_log.pop(0)


# ================================================================ #
#  管理器注入
# ================================================================ #

_managers: dict[str, Any] = {}


def set_managers(**kwargs: Any) -> None:
    """注入所有管理器实例。"""
    _managers.update(kwargs)


def _resolve_device_id_to_ip(mgr: "PTZManager", device_id: str) -> str | None:
    """解析 device_id 为实际 IP 地址。

    device_id 可能是 IP 地址或 MAC 地址。
    - 如果是 IP: 直接返回
    - 如果是 MAC: 从 SADP 发现缓存或已存储设备中查找 IP
    """
    import re
    # 判断是否为 MAC 地址格式 (冒号或横杠分隔的6组十六进制)
    mac_pattern = re.compile(r"^([0-9a-fA-F]{2}[:-]){5}[0-9a-fA-F]{2}$")
    if mac_pattern.match(device_id):
        # BUG-016 修复: 额外验证 MAC 长度必须为12位十六进制
        mac_clean = device_id.replace(":", "").replace("-", "").lower()
        if len(mac_clean) == 12 and re.match(r'^[0-9a-f]{12}$', mac_clean):
            # 是 MAC 地址，尝试从发现缓存中查找
            discovered = mgr.get_discovered_devices()
            for dev in discovered:
                dev_mac = dev.get("mac", "").lower().replace(":", "-")
                if dev_mac == device_id.lower().replace(":", "-"):
                    return dev.get("ip")
            # 从已存储设备中查找
            stored = mgr.list_stored_devices()
            for dev in stored:
                dev_mac = dev.get("mac", "").lower().replace(":", "-")
                if dev_mac == device_id.lower().replace(":", "-"):
                    ip = dev.get("ip", "")
                    if ip:
                        return ip
        return None
    # 看起来像 IP 地址，直接返回
    return device_id


# ================================================================ #
#  健康检查端点
# ================================================================ #


@health_router.get("/health", summary="全局健康检查")
async def global_health() -> dict:
    """全局健康检查端点 (GET /api/v1/health)。"""
    module_keys = (
        "ptz_manager",
        "device_manager",
        "stream_manager",
        "calibration_manager",
        "db_manager",
        "auth_service",
        "ws_manager",
        "ascom_manager",
        "health_monitor",
        "orchestrator",
    )

    module_health: dict[str, dict[str, Any]] = {}
    for key in module_keys:
        module_health[key] = {
            "status": "initialized" if _managers.get(key) is not None else "not_initialized",
            "present": key in _managers,
        }

    all_present = all(m["present"] for m in module_health.values())
    initialized_count = sum(1 for m in module_health.values() if m["present"])

    return {
        "status": "healthy" if all_present else "degraded",
        "modules": module_health,
        "timestamp": datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat(),
    }


# ================================================================ #
#  SADP 发现端点
# ================================================================ #


@api_router.get("/discovery/sadp", summary="SADP 设备发现", tags=["Discovery"])
async def sadp_discover(bind_ip: str = "0.0.0.0") -> dict:
    """通过 SADP 多播发现局域网内 PTZ 设备。
    
    BUG-003 修复: 直接使用 SADPManager，不依赖 PTZManager。
    """
    start = time.time()
    
    # 优先使用 PTZManager（如果已初始化）
    mgr: PTZManager | None = _managers.get("ptz_manager")  # type: ignore[assignment]
    if mgr:
        devices = mgr.discover_devices(bind_ip=bind_ip)
    else:
        # 直接使用 SADPManager 不依赖 PTZManager
        try:
            from src.core.sadp_discovery import SADPManager
            sadp_mgr = SADPManager()
            raw_devices = sadp_mgr.discover_devices(timeout=10, bind_ip=bind_ip)
            # 转换为 SADP 标准格式
            devices = []
            for d in raw_devices:
                devices.append({
                    "mac": d.get("mac", ""),
                    "ip": d.get("ip", ""),
                    "subnet_mask": d.get("subnet_mask", ""),
                    "gateway": d.get("gateway", ""),
                    "model": d.get("model", ""),
                    "serial_number": d.get("serial_number", ""),
                    "device_name": d.get("device_name", ""),
                    "firmware_version": d.get("firmware_version", ""),
                    "activated": d.get("activated", False),
                    "is_hikvision": d.get("is_hikvision", False),
                    "source": "sadp",
                })
        except Exception as e:
            return {"success": False, "message": f"SADP 发现异常: {e}", "devices": []}
    
    elapsed = round(time.time() - start, 1)

    # BUG-015 修复: 统一 MAC 地址格式为横杠小写 (24-0f-9b-76-41-93)
    for dev in devices:
        mac = dev.get("mac", "")
        if mac:
            clean = mac.replace(":", "").replace("-", "").lower()
            if len(clean) == 12:
                dev["mac"] = "-".join(clean[i:i+2] for i in range(0, 12, 2))

    return {
        "success": True,
        "message": f"发现 {len(devices)} 台设备 (耗时 {elapsed}s)",
        "devices": devices,
        "count": len(devices),
    }

没有 WebSocket 代理！海康 WASM SDK 需要 WebSocket 代理将前端 WS 请求转发到摄像机的 RTSP 端口。7681 是海康 WASM 插件的默认 WS 端口。

让我检查 SDK 的代理配置：

arguments.command: cd C:\Users\admin\.openclaw\agents\dev-factory\astrohub; Select-String -Path "src\web\index.html" -Pattern "webVideoCtrlProxy|proxyIp|proxyPort" | Select-Object LineNumber, Line | Format-Table -AutoSize -Wrap

content.text:
SDK 设置 cookie `webVideoCtrlProxyWs=192.168.5.72:7681`，但服务器需要配置 WebSocket 代理来转发请求。

问题根源：
1. **没有 WebSocket 代理服务** — 海康 WASM SDK 需要 ws://proxy 端点
2. **摄像机 WebSocket 端口 7681** — SDK 连接这个端口获取视频流

让我检查 AstroHub 的 WebSocket 代理实现：

# WebSocket proxy - handle SDK's actual URL format
# SDK sends: ws://proxy/ws?version=0.1&cipherSuites=0&token=xxx
# Note: SDK may also send ws://proxy/?version=... so we handle both
@app.websocket("/ws")
async def ws_sdk_proxy(websocket: WebSocket):
    """Handle SDK WebSocket connection with query params."""
    # Check if this is SDK WebSocket request (has token in query params)
    token = websocket.query_params.get("token", "")
    
    log.info(f"WS SDK proxy: query_params={dict(websocket.query_params)}")
    
    # If no token, it's internal health check - accept but close
    if not token:
        await websocket.accept()
        await websocket.close(code=1000, reason="No token - health check")
        return
    
    # Get token from query params
    token = websocket.query_params.get("token", "")
    version = websocket.query_params.get("version", "0.1")
    
    # Get cookies for camera IP and port
    client_headers = dict(websocket.headers)
    ws_cookie = client_headers.get("cookie", "")
    
    camera_ip = "192.168.5.72"
    camera_ws_port = 7681
    channel = "101"  # Default channel 1, stream 1
    
    for cookie in ws_cookie.split(";"):
        cookie = cookie.strip()
        if cookie.startswith("webVideoCtrlProxyWs="):
            target = cookie.split("=")[1]
            parts = target.split(":")
            if len(parts) == 2:
                camera_ip = parts[0]
                camera_ws_port = int(parts[1])
        elif cookie.startswith("webVideoCtrlProxyWsChannel="):
            channel = cookie.split("=")[1]
    
    # Build camera WebSocket URL
    camera_ws_url = f"ws://{camera_ip}:{camera_ws_port}/{channel}?version={version}&cipherSuites=0&token={token}"
    log.info(f"WS SDK proxy: connecting to {camera_ws_url}")
    
    # Get WebSession cookie for auth
    ws_session_cookie = ""
    for c in ws_cookie.split(";"):
        c = c.strip()
        if c.startswith("WebSession"):
            ws_session_cookie = c
            break
    
    ws_auth_headers = {"Cookie": ws_session_cookie} if ws_session_cookie else {}
    log.info(f"WS SDK proxy: token={token}, channel={channel}, cookie={ws_session_cookie[:50] if ws_session_cookie else 'NONE'}")
    
    try:
        await websocket.accept()
    except Exception as e:
        log.error(f"WS SDK proxy: accept failed: {e}")
        return
    
    import websockets
    import websockets.exceptions
    
    try:
        async with websockets.connect(camera_ws_url, additional_headers=ws_auth_headers) as cam_ws:
            log.info(f"WS SDK proxy: connected to camera")
            
            async def browser_to_camera():
                try:
                    async for msg in websocket.iter_text():
                        await cam_ws.send(msg)
                except websockets.exceptions.ConnectionClosed:
                    pass
                except WebSocketDisconnect:
                    pass
            
            async def camera_to_browser():
                try:
                    async for msg in cam_ws:
                        await websocket.send_text(msg)
                except websockets.exceptions.ConnectionClosed:
                    pass
            
            await asyncio.gather(browser_to_camera(), camera_to_browser())
    except websockets.exceptions.InvalidStatus as e:
        log.error(f"WS SDK proxy: camera rejected: {e}")
    except Exception as e:
        log.error(f"WS SDK proxy: failed: {e}")
    
    log.info("WS SDK proxy: closed")

async def websocket_proxy_channel(websocket: WebSocket, channel: str):
    # Get cookies from client headers
    client_headers = dict(websocket.headers)

    log.info(f"WS proxy: channel={channel}, cookies={ws_cookie[:80]}...")

现在我理解了整个架构。WebSocket 代理和 ISAPI 代理都存在，但 WebSocket 路由注册有问题：

```
app.add_websocket_route("/ws", ws_handler)
app.add_websocket_route("/", ws_handler)
app.add_websocket_route("/{path:path}", ws_handler)
```

但 `ws_sdk_proxy` 和 `websocket_proxy_channel` 是通过 `@app.websocket` 装饰器定义的，这些可能和 `ws_handler` 冲突。让我确认 `ws_handler` 是什么：

from starlette.responses import JSONResponse

async def ws_handler(websocket: WebSocket):
    """Handle SDK WebSocket - any path with token query param."""
    token = websocket.query_params.get("token", "")
    path = websocket.url.path
    log.info(f"WS handler: path={path}, token={'yes' if token else 'no'}")
    
    if not token:
        # No token - health check
        await websocket.accept()
        await websocket.close(code=1000)
        return
    
    # Has token - SDK video streaming
    version = websocket.query_params.get("version", "0.1")
    
    # Get cookies
    client_headers = dict(websocket.headers)
    ws_cookie = client_headers.get("cookie", "")
    
    camera_ip = "192.168.5.72"
    camera_ws_port = 7681
    channel = "101"
    
    for cookie in ws_cookie.split(";"):

老板，视频测试结果：

## 视频画面测试 — ❌ 无画面

### 测试流程
1. 加载页面 ✅
2. 连接设备（API）✅ — `192.168.5.72` 连接成功
3. WASM SDK 登录 ✅ — `clickLogin2()` 被调用
4. ISAPI 代理 ✅ — 通道信息、token 都获取成功

### 失败原因

```
WebSocket /ws → accepted → connection open → connection closed（立即关闭）
```

- **WASM SDK 错误码 1008** = 首帧超时（10秒内没收到视频首帧）
- **WebSocket 代理**：连接被接受后立即关闭，没有转发到摄像机
- **Canvas 全黑**：300x150 默认尺寸，0% 非黑像素
- **divPlugin 容器**：width=0, height=0（不可见）

### 根因分析

WebSocket 代理的 `ws_handler` 没有正确转发 SDK 请求到摄像机的 7681 端口。所有 WS 连接都是 `accept → close` 模式。

### 不修改代码的结论

**视频无法播放**。需要修复 WebSocket 代理转发逻辑才能看到画面。

现在检查前端 JS 如何读取设备信息：
现在绘制完整的配置文件数据流：

"""
AstroHub v2.0 - 设备配置管理

统一管理设备配置：
- 当前设备标记: data/device_config.json (current_device 字段)
- 设备详细信息: data/devices/{MAC}.json (与 config_writer.py 共用)
- IP/MAC/型号等信息从单设备配置文件读写

Author: 雅痞张@南方天文
"""

from __future__ import annotations

import json
from pathlib import Path
from typing import Any

# 当前设备标记文件（仅存储 current_device + 索引）
CONFIG_FILE = Path(__file__).parent.parent.parent / "data" / "device_config.json"
# 单设备配置目录（与 config_writer.py 共用）
DEVICES_DIR = Path(__file__).parent.parent.parent / "data" / "devices"


def _normalize_mac(mac: str) -> str:
    """统一 MAC 格式：转大写，横杠置换为冒号。"""
    return mac.strip().replace("-", ":").upper()


def _mac_to_config_key(mac: str) -> str:
    """MAC 转为 config索引键：无分隔符，小写。"""
    return mac.replace(":", "").lower()


def ensure_config() -> Path:
    """确保配置文件和设备目录存在。"""
    CONFIG_FILE.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    DEVICES_DIR.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    if not CONFIG_FILE.exists():
        save_config({"current_device": None, "devices": {}})
    return CONFIG_FILE


def load_config() -> dict[str, Any]:
    """加载当前设备标记配置。"""
    ensure_config()
    with open(CONFIG_FILE, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        return json.load(f)


def save_config(config: dict[str, Any]) -> None:
    """保存当前设备标记配置。"""
    CONFIG_FILE.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    with open(CONFIG_FILE, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        json.dump(config, f, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)


def _load_device_file(mac: str) -> dict[str, Any] | None:
    """从 data/devices/{MAC}.json 读取单设备配置。"""
    norm_mac = _normalize_mac(mac)
    config_path = DEVICES_DIR / f"{norm_mac}.json"
    if not config_path.exists():
        return None
    with open(config_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        return json.load(f)


def _save_device_file(mac: str, data: dict[str, Any]) -> None:
    """写入 data/devices/{MAC}.json 单设备配置。"""
    DEVICES_DIR.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    norm_mac = _normalize_mac(mac)
    config_path = DEVICES_DIR / f"{norm_mac}.json"
    with open(config_path, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        json.dump(data, f, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)


def get_current_device() -> dict[str, Any] | None:
    """获取当前设备信息。

    从 device_config.json 读取 current_device 标记，
    再从 data/devices/{MAC}.json 读取完整设备信息。
    """
    config = load_config()
    current_mac = config.get("current_device")
    if not current_mac:
        return None

    # 优先从单设备配置文件读取
    device_data = _load_device_file(current_mac)
    if device_data is not None:
        return device_data

    # 回退到索引中的基本信息
    return config.get("devices", {}).get(current_mac)


def set_current_device(mac: str, ip: str = "", model: str = "", port: int = 80, username: str = "", password: str = "") -> None:
    """设置当前设备。

    同时更新:
    1. device_config.json 的 current_device 标记
    2. data/devices/{MAC}.json 的完整设备信息
    """
    config = load_config()
    config_key = _mac_to_config_key(mac)

    # 更新索引
    config["current_device"] = config_key
    if config_key not in config.get("devices", {}):
        config.setdefault("devices", {})[config_key] = {}
    config["devices"][config_key]["mac"] = config_key
    if ip:
        config["devices"][config_key]["ip"] = ip
    if model:
        config["devices"][config_key]["model"] = model
    config["devices"][config_key]["port"] = port
    if username:
        config["devices"][config_key]["username"] = username
    if password:
        config["devices"][config_key]["password"] = password

    # 更新单设备配置文件
    norm_mac = _normalize_mac(mac)
    device_data = _load_device_file(norm_mac) or {
        "mac": norm_mac,
        "ip": ip,
        "port": port,
        "model": model or "",
    }
    if ip:
        device_data["ip"] = ip
    if model:
        device_data["model"] = model
    if port:
        device_data["port"] = port
    if username:
        device_data["username"] = username
    if password:
        device_data["password"] = password
    _save_device_file(norm_mac, device_data)

    # 保存索引
    save_config(config)


def update_device_info(mac: str, **kwargs) -> None:
    """更新设备信息。

    同时更新 device_config.json 索引和 data/devices/{MAC}.json。
    """
    config_key = _mac_to_config_key(mac)
    config = load_config()

    # 更新索引
    if config_key not in config.get("devices", {}):
        config.setdefault("devices", {})[config_key] = {"mac": config_key}
    config["devices"][config_key].update(kwargs)
    save_config(config)

    # 更新单设备配置文件
    norm_mac = _normalize_mac(mac)
    device_data = _load_device_file(norm_mac)
    if device_data is not None:
        device_data.update(kwargs)
        _save_device_file(norm_mac, device_data)


def list_devices() -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
    """列出所有历史设备。

    合并索引和单设备配置文件的信息。
    """
    config = load_config()
    results = []
    for config_key, index_info in config.get("devices", {}).items():
        # 优先使用单设备配置文件
        norm_mac = _normalize_mac(config_key)
        device_data = _load_device_file(norm_mac)
        if device_data is not None:
            results.append(device_data)
        else:
            results.append(index_info)
    return results


def get_device_by_mac(mac: str) -> dict[str, Any] | None:
    """根据MAC获取设备信息。

    优先从 data/devices/{MAC}.json 读取。
    """
    norm_mac = _normalize_mac(mac)
    device_data = _load_device_file(norm_mac)
    if device_data is not None:
        return device_data

    # 回退到索引
    config_key = _mac_to_config_key(mac)
    config = load_config()
    return config.get("devices", {}).get(config_key)

"""
AstroHub v2.0 - 设备 Config 写入模块

将功能探测/限位测试/速度测试结果写入设备 config 文件。
保存到 data/devices/{mac}.json

Author: 雅痞张@南方天文
"""

from __future__ import annotations

import json
import os
import tempfile
from dataclasses import dataclass, field, asdict
from datetime import datetime, timezone
from pathlib import Path
from typing import Any

from src.config_paths import DATA_DIR


DEVICES_DIR = DATA_DIR / "devices"


@dataclass
class DeviceConfig:
    """设备配置数据结构。"""
    mac: str = ""
    ip: str = ""
    port: int = 80
    username: str = "admin"
    password: str = ""
    model: str = ""
    serial_number: str = ""
    firmware_version: str = ""
    first_seen: str = ""
    last_updated: str = ""
    capabilities: dict = field(default_factory=dict)
    limits: dict = field(default_factory=dict)
    speed: dict = field(default_factory=dict)
    onboarding_complete: bool = False
    onboarding_started: bool = False
    metadata: dict = field(default_factory=dict)

    def to_dict(self) -> dict:
        return asdict(self)

    @classmethod
    def from_dict(cls, data: dict) -> "DeviceConfig":
        return cls(**{k: v for k, v in data.items() if k in cls.__dataclass_fields__})


def _atomic_write(path: Path, data: dict) -> None:
    """通过 tempfile + os.replace() 安全写入 JSON 文件，保证原子性。"""
    path = path.resolve()
    dir_ = path.parent
    dir_.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    fd, tmp_path = tempfile.mkstemp(dir=dir_, suffix=".tmp")
    try:
        with os.fdopen(fd, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
            json.dump(data, f, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)
            f.write("\n")
        os.replace(tmp_path, path)
    except Exception:
        try:
            os.unlink(tmp_path)
        except OSError:
            pass
        raise


def _normalize_mac(mac: str) -> str:
    """统一 MAC 格式：转大写，横杠置换为冒号。"""
    return mac.strip().replace("-", ":").upper()


def load_device_config(mac: str) -> DeviceConfig | None:
    """加载设备配置文件。"""
    norm_mac = _normalize_mac(mac)
    config_path = DEVICES_DIR / f"{norm_mac}.json"

    if not config_path.exists():
        return None

    with open(config_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        data = json.load(f)

    return DeviceConfig.from_dict(data)


def save_device_config(config: DeviceConfig) -> None:
    """保存设备配置文件。"""
    norm_mac = _normalize_mac(config.mac)
    config_path = DEVICES_DIR / f"{norm_mac}.json"
    config.last_updated = datetime.now(timezone.utc).replace(tzinfo=None).isoformat()
    _atomic_write(config_path, config.to_dict())


def write_device_config(
    mac: str,
    capabilities: dict | None = None,
    limits: dict | None = None,
    speed: dict | None = None,
    ip: str = "",
    port: int = 80,
    username: str = "admin",
    password: str = "",
    model: str = "",
    serial_number: str = "",
    firmware_version: str = "",
) -> dict:
    """将测试结果写入设备 config 文件。

    步骤:
    1. 读取或创建设备 config
    2. 更新 capabilities/limits/speed 字段
    3. 保存到 data/devices/{mac}.json
    4. 返回写入结果

    返回:
        {"success": bool, "path": str, "message": str}
    """
    norm_mac = _normalize_mac(mac)
    config_path = DEVICES_DIR / f"{norm_mac}.json"

    # 读取已有配置或创建新配置
    existing = load_device_config(norm_mac)
    if existing:
        config = existing
    else:
        config = DeviceConfig(
            mac=norm_mac,
            ip=ip,
            first_seen=datetime.now(timezone.utc).replace(tzinfo=None).isoformat(),
        )

    # 更新基本信息
    if ip:
        config.ip = ip
    if port:
        config.port = port
    if username:
        config.username = username
    if password:
        config.password = password
    if model:
        config.model = model
    if serial_number:
        config.serial_number = serial_number
    if firmware_version:
        config.firmware_version = firmware_version

    # 更新测试结果
    if capabilities is not None:
        config.capabilities = capabilities
    if limits is not None:
        config.limits = limits
    if speed is not None:
        config.speed = speed

    # 保存
    try:
        save_device_config(config)
        return {
            "success": True,
            "path": str(config_path),
            "message": f"设备配置已保存: {norm_mac}",
            "config": config.to_dict(),
        }
    except Exception as e:
        return {
            "success": False,
            "path": str(config_path),
            "message": f"保存失败: {e}",
        }


def list_device_configs() -> list[dict]:
    """列出所有已保存的设备配置。"""
    if not DEVICES_DIR.exists():
        return []

    configs = []
    for config_file in DEVICES_DIR.glob("*.json"):
        try:
            with open(config_file, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
                data = json.load(f)
            configs.append(data)
        except Exception:
            pass

    return configs


def delete_device_config(mac: str) -> bool:
    """删除设备配置文件。"""
    norm_mac = _normalize_mac(mac)
    config_path = DEVICES_DIR / f"{norm_mac}.json"

    if config_path.exists():
        config_path.unlink()
        return True
    return False

content.text: 现在检查前端 JS 如何获取设备列表和凭证：

现在我看清了完整的数据流：

**前端获取凭证流程：**
1. 调用 `/api/v1/devices` → 获取设备列表
2. 找到在线设备 → 调用 `/api/v1/ptz/devices/{ip}/credentials`
3. 设置 `window.connectedDevice`
4. 调用 `clickLogin2()` → WASM SDK 登录

**问题：** `/api/v1/ptz/devices/{ip}/credentials` 返回 `{success: false, message: "凭证不存在"}`，因为凭证存在 `data/devices/{MAC}.json` 中，而不是 `PTZManager._credentials` 内存中。

让我确认：

**根因确认！**

`/api/v1/ptz/devices/{ip}/credentials` 只从 `PTZManager._credentials` 内存读取，而凭证实际存在 `data/devices/{MAC}.json` 文件中。

`PTZManager._load_saved_credentials` 从 `ptz_config.json` 读取，而 SADP 发现/onboarding 写入的是 `data/devices/{MAC}.json`。两者路径不一致。

现在梳理所有配置文件的数据流：

```
data/
├── device_config.json        ← device_config.py 读写（current_device 标记 + 索引）
├── config/
│   ├── local.json             ← 本机配置
│   └── ptz_config.json        ← PTZManager 启动加载凭据
├── devices/
│   ├── 240F9B764193.json       ← config_writer.py / onboarding.py 写入（完整设备信息）
│   └── devices.json            ← DeviceManager (M2模块) 的存储
```

**不一致问题：**
1. `ptz_config.json` 有凭证 `Nftw1357` ✅
2. `data/devices/240F9B764193.json` 有凭证 `Nftw1357` ✅
3. `device_config.json` 有密码 `admin123` ❌（过时/错误）
4. API `credentials` 端点只读内存 `_credentials`，不读文件 ❌

**修复方案：** `/api/v1/ptz/devices/{ip}/credentials` 应该先查内存，再查 `data/devices/{MAC}.json`。

老板，遍历完成。以下是发现：

## 配置文件关系图

```
data/
├── device_config.json         ← current_device 标记 + 索引（密码 admin123 ❌ 过时）
├── config/ptz_config.json     ← PTZManager 启动加载凭据（密码 Nftw1357 ✅）
├── devices/
│   ├── 240F9B764193.json      ← 完整设备信息（密码 Nftw1357 ✅）
│   └── devices.json            ← M2 设备列表（空）
```

## 核心问题

**凭证查询链路断裂：**

```
前端 JS → GET /api/v1/ptz/devices/{ip}/credentials
              ↓
         PTZManager._credentials[ip]  ← 只查内存
              ↓
         返回 "凭据不存在" ❌
```

但凭证实际在两个文件中都有：
- `ptz_config.json` ✅（但只在启动时加载到内存）
- `data/devices/240F9B764193.json` ✅（但 credentials 端点不读它）

**需要修复：** credentials 端点应该回退读取配置文件。

另外 `device_config.json` 中密码 `admin123` 是过时的，应统一为 `Nftw1357`。

要修复吗？
明白！先遍历文件路径，确认配置文件的位置和内容，再修复关联。

发现关键配置文件：

1. `data/device_config.json` — 设备配置（当前设备）
2. `data/devices/240F9B764193.json` — 单设备详细配置
3. `data/config/ptz_config.json` — PTZ 配置

让我读取这些配置文件：
好，配置文件都有账号密码。现在遍历所有读取设备信息的代码路径：

关键文件：`device_config.py`、`device_path.py`、`config_writer.py`、`onboarding.py`、`startup.py`。

现在绘制完整的配置文件数据流：

1. 如果没提供凭证 → 从 `mgr.get_credentials(target_ip)` 获取
2. 如果没密码 → 返回 `"请提供密码"`

但 `PTZManager.get_credentials` 读取的是内存中的 `_credentials`，不是配置文件！

@api_router.get("/devices", summary="设备列表", tags=["Devices"])
async def list_devices() -> dict:
    """获取设备列表（MAC 去重合并 SADP 发现 + 手动存储）."""
    mgr: PTZManager | None = _managers.get("ptz_manager")  # type: ignore[assignment]
    if not mgr:
        return {"success": False, "data": [], "total": 0}

    def _normalize_mac(mac: str) -> str:
        """统一 MAC 为横杠小写格式 (24-0f-9b-76-41-93)"""
        clean = mac.replace(":", "").replace("-", "").lower()
        # 验证: 必须是恰好12位十六进制字符
        if len(clean) != 12 or not re.match(r'^[0-9a-f]{12}$', clean):
            return ""
        return "-".join(clean[i:i + 2 for i in range(0, 12, 2))
    def _has_device_mac(dev: dict) -> bool:
        return bool(_normalize_mac(dev.get("mac", "") or ""))
    stored = mgr.list_stored_devices()
    discovered = mgr.get_disscribed_devices()
    online_ips = mgr.list_controllers()
    keyed: dict[str, Any] = {}  # normalized_mac -> merged record
    no_mac: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
    # --- Pass 1: 存储设备按 MAC 建索引 ---
    for dev in stored:
        mac_norm = _normalize_mac(dev.get("mac", "") or "")
        if mac_norm:
            keyed[mac_norm] = {
                "mac": mac_norm,
                "ip": dev.get("ip", ""),
                "model": dev.get("model", ""),
                "device_name": dev.get("device_name") or dev.get("name", ""),
                "source": "manual",
                "online": False,
                "activated": False,
                "has_credentials": True,
            }
        else:
            no_mac.append({
                "mac": "",
                "ip": dev.get("ip", ""),
                "model": dev.get("model", ""),
                "device_name": dev.get("device_name") or dev.get("name", ""),
                "source": "manual",
                "online": False,
                "activated": False,
                "has_credentials": True,
            })
    # --- Pass 2: 合并 SADP 发现设备 ---
    for sadp in discovered:
        sadp_mac = _normalize_mac(sadp.get("mac", "") or "")
        if sadp_mac and sadp_mac in keyed:
            # 匹配到存储设备 → 合并
            existing = keyed[sadp_mac]
            existing["ip"] = sadp.get("ip") or existing["ip"]
            existing["model"] = sadp.get("model") or existing["model"]
            existing["device_name"] = (
                sadp.get("device_name")
                or sadp.get("name")
                or existing.get("device_name", "")
            )
            existing["source"] = "sadp+manual"
            existing["activated"] = sadp.get("activated", False)
            # 更新在线状态
            for ip_key in online_ips:
            if ip_key in keyed:
                keyed[ip_key]["online"] = True
            # 如果 ip_key == sadp.get("ip"):
                keyed[ip_key]["online"] = True
        elif sadp_mac:
            keyed[sadp_mac] = {
                "mac": sadp_mac,
                "ip": sadp.get("ip", ""),
                "model": sadp.get("model", ""),
                "device_name": sadp.get("device_name") or sadp.get("name", ""),
                "source": "sadp",
                "online": False,
                "activated": sadp.get("activated", False),
                "has_credentials": False,
            }
    # --- Pass 3: 添加已连接设备 ---
    for ip_key in online_ips:
        if ip_key in keyed:
        keyed[ip_key]["online"] = True
    # 没有 MAC 但 没有对应的在线设备标记为在线
    for ip_key in online_ips:
        if ip_key not in keyed:
            no_mac.append({
                "ip": ip_key,
                "source": "connected",
                "online": True,
                "has_credentials": True,
            })
    allDevices = list(keyed.values()) + no_mac
    allDevices.sort(key=lambda x: (0 if d.get("source") == "connected" else 1)
    return allDevices

"""模拟用户E2E: 打开→设备管理→连接→主控台看视频→断开"""
import asyncio, json
from playwright.async_api import async_playwright
from datetime import datetime

BASE = "http://localhost:8000"
DIR = "C:/Users/admin/.openclaw/agents/dev-factory/astrohub/data/e2e_screenshots"

async def run():
    async with async_playwright() as p:
        browser = await p.chromium.launch(headless=True)
        page = await browser.new_page(viewport={"width":1920,"height":1080})
        msgs = []
        page.on("console", lambda m: msgs.append(f"[{m.type}]{m.text[:120]}"))

        # 1. 打开页面
        print("[1] 打开页面...")
        await page.goto(BASE, timeout=15000)
        await page.wait_for_load_state("networkidle", timeout=15000)
        await page.screenshot(path=f"{DIR}/user_01_home.png")

        # 2. 点设备管理
        print("[2] 设备管理...")
        btns = await page.query_selector_all("button.nav-btn")
        if len(btns) >= 2:
            await btns[1].click()
            await page.wait_for_timeout(1500)
        await page.screenshot(path=f"{DIR}/user_02_devices.png")

        # 3. 点SADP发现
        print("[3] SADP发现...")
        discover = await page.query_selector("#btnDiscover")
        if discover:
            await discover.click()
            print("  等待发现完成(15s)...")
            await page.wait_for_timeout(15000)
        await page.screenshot(path=f"{DIR}/user_03_discover.png")

        # 4. 检查设备列表，找连接按钮
        print("[4] 查找连接按钮...")
        # 刷新设备列表后找"连接"按钮
        connect_btns = await page.query_selector_all("button")
        connected = False
        for btn in connect_btns:
            try:
                text = await btn.inner_text()
                if "连接" in text and "btn-primary" in (await btn.get_attribute("class") or ""):
                    print(f"  找到连接按钮: {text}")
                    await btn.click()
                    connected = True
                    await page.wait_for_timeout(5000)
                    break
            except:
                continue
        
        if not connected:
            # 尝试通过API连接
            print("  未找到连接按钮，通过API连接...")
            r = await page.evaluate("""
                async () => {
                    const r = await fetch('/api/v1/devices/192.168.5.72/connect', {
                        method:'POST', headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},
                        body: JSON.stringify({username:'admin',password:'Nftw1357',port:80})
                    });
                    return await r.json();
                }
            """)
            print(f"  API连接: {json.dumps(r,ensure_ascii=False)[:100]}")
            await page.wait_for_timeout(3000)
            # 刷新页面设备列表
            await page.evaluate("if(typeof refreshDevices==='function') refreshDevices();")
            await page.wait_for_timeout(2000)
        
        await page.screenshot(path=f"{DIR}/user_04_connected.png")

        # 5. 检查connectedDevice和WASM
        print("[5] 检查WASM状态...")
        state = await page.evaluate("""
            () => ({
                connectedDevice: window.connectedDevice ? {
                    ip: window.connectedDevice.ip,
                    online: window.connectedDevice.online
                } : null,
                bLoggedIn: window.g_bLoggedIn2,
                bPlaying: window.g_bPlaying2,
                WebVideoCtrl: typeof WebVideoCtrl !== 'undefined',
            })
        """)
        print(f"  状态: {json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)}")

        # 6. 切到主控台看视频
        print("[6] 主控台...")
        btns = await page.query_selector_all("button.nav-btn")
        if len(btns) >= 3:
            await btns[2].click()
            await page.wait_for_timeout(2000)
        await page.screenshot(path=f"{DIR}/user_05_console.png")

        # 等待视频流
        print("  等待视频(15s)...")
        await page.wait_for_timeout(15000)
        await page.screenshot(path=f"{DIR}/user_06_video.png")

        # 7. 检查canvas
        canvas = await page.evaluate("""
            () => {
                const c = document.getElementById('divPlugin_playCanvas0');
                if (!c) return {found:false};
                const ctx = c.getContext('2d');
                const w=c.width, h=c.height;
                if (w===0||h===0) return {found:true,w,h,content:false};
                try {
                    const d = ctx.getImageData(0,0,w,h).data;
                    let nb=0, tot=d.length/4;
                    for(let i=0;i<d.length;i+=4) if(d[i]>10||d[i+1]>10||d[i+2]>10) nb++;
                    return {found:true,w,h,content:nb>tot*0.01,ratio:(nb/tot*100).toFixed(2)+'%'};
                } catch(e) { return {found:true,w,h,content:false,err:e.message}; }
            }
        """)
        print(f"  Canvas: {json.dumps(canvas)}")

        # 8. 断开设备
        print("[8] 断开设备...")
        # 回到设备管理
        btns = await page.query_selector_all("button.nav-btn")
        if len(btns) >= 2:
            await btns[1].click()
            await page.wait_for_timeout(1500)
        
        # 找断开按钮
        disc_btns = await page.query_selector_all("button")
        disconnected = False
        for btn in disc_btns:
            try:
                text = await btn.inner_text()
                cls = await btn.get_attribute("class") or ""
                if "断开" in text and "btn-secondary" in cls:
                    print(f"  找到断开按钮: {text}")
                    await btn.click()
                    disconnected = True
                    await page.wait_for_timeout(3000)
                    break
            except:
                continue
        
        if not disconnected:
            print("  未找到断开按钮，通过API断开...")
            await page.evaluate("""
                async () => {
                    await fetch('/api/v1/devices/192.168.5.72/disconnect', {method:'POST'});
                }
            """)
            await page.wait_for_timeout(2000)
        
        await page.screenshot(path=f"{DIR}/user_07_disconnected.png")

        # 检查断开后状态
        state2 = await page.evaluate("""
            () => ({
                connectedDevice: window.connectedDevice ? window.connectedDevice.ip : null,
                bLoggedIn: window.g_bLoggedIn2,
                bPlaying: window.g_bPlaying2,
            })
        """)
        print(f"  断开后: {json.dumps(state2,ensure_ascii=False)}")

        # 9. 错误日志
        errors = [m for m in msgs if "[error]" in m]
        print(f"\n[9] Console errors: {len(errors)}")
        for e in errors[:5]:
            print(f"  {e}")

        await browser.close()

    # 结果
    print("\n" + "="*50)
    print("RESULT")
    print("="*50)
    print(f"Canvas: {json.dumps(canvas)}")
    print(f"Connected: {state}")
    print(f"Disconnected: {state2}")

asyncio.run(run())

## 用户流程测试

### ✅ 正常

| SADP发现 | 找到设备 ✅ |
